$description: Component tokens for Select dropdown fields with default and destructive (error) states across 6 sizes. Figma Reference: Select Component

$component.name: Select
$component.description: A dropdown selection component for choosing from predefined options. Includes chevron indicator, validation states, and focus indicators.
$component.structure: Container with border, selected value display, chevron icon for dropdown indication, with focus states and validation feedback

sizes.3xs: 24px height - Minimal size for very compact layouts
sizes.2xs: 28px height - Extra small for dense forms
sizes.xs: 32px height - Small size for compact interfaces
sizes.sm: 36px height - Standard small size for most forms
sizes.lg: 44px height - Large size for prominent selects

variants.default: Standard select with neutral colors for normal selection
variants.destructive: Error state with red/error colors for validation feedback

usage.contexts: Forms, filters, settings panels, data entry interfaces, navigation, configuration screens
usage.features: Chevron indicator, validation states, focus indicators, disabled state, icon support

xs.description: Select border radius for xs size

sm.description: Select border radius for sm size

md.description: Select border radius for md size

lg.description: Select border radius for lg size

padding.$comment: Internal spacing for select content - horizontal (x) and vertical (y) padding

xs.description: Select horizontal padding for xs size

sm.description: Select horizontal padding for sm size

md.description: Select horizontal padding for md size

lg.description: Select horizontal padding for lg size

xs.description: Select vertical padding for xs size

sm.description: Select vertical padding for sm size

md.description: Select vertical padding for md size

lg.description: Select vertical padding for lg size

height.$comment: Select field heights for each size variant

gap.$comment: Spacing between select elements (text, icons, and chevron)

search-variant.description: Gap between select elements for search variant

shadow.$comment: Subtle elevation shadow for select fields

text.$comment: Typography tokens for select text content across all sizes

xs.description: Select text typography for xs size

sm.description: Select text typography for sm size

md.description: Select text typography for md size

lg.description: Select text typography for lg size

icon.$comment: Icon sizes for chevron, leading icon, trailing icon & search icon inside select fields

filter-icon.$comment: Icon sizes for filter icon inside select fields

color.$comment: Color tokens for select states - includes default (neutral) and destructive (error/validation) variants with interaction states

default.$comment: Default select colors with neutral palette for standard selection

disabled.description: Default select background in disabled state

3xs.description: Tags size for 3xs size - tag size: xs; tag height: 18px
